creator: koobs.freebsd@gmail.com
text:
Hi Michael, thanks for your submission.

Note that 3.2.4 existed previous under zmq-devel, and has now been moved
to net/libzmq3 (along with some updates) to follow the creation of the
new net/libzmq4 port

Port maintainers of software that depend on libzmq will need to select
the appropriate port based on version compatibility

Next step is to finalise the transition to the new naming convention by
moving devel/zmq to net/libzmq2, which will occur outside of the scope
of this PR

Enjoy!
